title: Ukraine's Pulverizing Long-Range Strike Campaign
gist: Ukraine and Russia have escalated long-range strike campaigns against each other's energy and logistics infrastructure, penetrating deeper into both capitals' regions, with timing that coincided with the NATO summit.

insights.claim: Ukraine and Russia have escalated their long-range strike campaigns against key energy and logistics infrastructure, with strikes penetrating deeper and more frequently into both capitals' regions.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Deep strikes on energy infrastructure heighten risk to power supply heading into fall and winter.

insights.claim: The analysis frames Ukraine's expanded offensive strike strategy around what the deeper strikes could mean for the coming fall and winter seasons.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Winter energy-infrastructure attrition is the seasonal variable to watch for both economies.

insights.claim: The timing of Ukraine's large, long-range strikes has coincided with the NATO summit.
insights.speaker: War on the Rocks
insights.so_what: Suggests strikes are being sequenced for diplomatic signaling around alliance events.
insights.locator: why the timing of these large, long-range strikes
